degrees.MHA: Master of Health Administration: Provider operations, hospital leadership
degrees.MPH: Master of Public Health: Population health, epidemiology, policy
degrees.MSHI: Master of Science in Health Informatics: Health IT, data systems, EHR
degrees.MBA-HC: MBA with Healthcare Concentration: Finance, strategy, entrepreneurship

tracks.name: Healthcare Administration, Operations, Quality & Risk
tracks.description: Leadership evidence, ops/management interest, hospital or health system goal, quality improvement language. Fits with MHA primary, or MPH, MBA-HC.

tracks.name: Healthcare Consulting & Advisory
tracks.description: Project-based advisory interest, client-facing problem solving, strategy or transformation language, implementation focus. Fits subtrack-specific degrees.

tracks.name: Healthcare Finance, Payer Strategy & Value-Based Care
tracks.description: Finance/accounting background, payer or revenue cycle interest, VBC/ACO keywords, quantitative strength. Fits MBA-HC primary, or MHA, MSHI.

tracks.name: Behavioral Health & Human Services Management
tracks.description: Mental health or SUD interest, community behavioral health language, psychology or social work background. Fits MPH primary, or MHA.

tracks.name: Public, Community & Global Health Programs
tracks.description: Community health interest, health equity language, disease prevention, outreach/education, global health focus. Fits MPH primary, or MHA, MBA-HC.

tracks.name: Population Health Analytics, Epidemiology & Outcomes Research
tracks.description: Epidemiology or biostatistics interest, data analysis keywords, research methodology, outcomes/evaluation focus. Fits MPH primary, or MSHI, MBA-HC.

tracks.name: Health Policy, Economics & Advocacy
tracks.description: Policy or legislative interest, advocacy language, government or regulatory career goal, health economics. Fits MPH primary, or MBA-HC, MHA.

tracks.name: Environmental, Occupational & Climate Health
tracks.description: Environmental health interest, occupational safety, toxicology/exposure keywords, food safety or climate-health focus. Fits MPH primary, or MHA.

tracks.name: Digital Health, Informatics & Data Governance
tracks.description: Health IT or EHR interest, technical skills such as SQL/Python, interoperability keywords, clinical informatics, data governance. Fits MSHI primary, or MHA, MBA-HC.

tracks.name: Life Sciences, Clinical Research & Regulatory Management
tracks.description: Pharma/biotech/medtech interest, clinical trials or regulatory affairs keywords, FDA/IRB language, life sciences + business combination. Fits MBA-HC primary, or MPH, MSHI.

tracks.name: Healthcare Entrepreneurship, Product & Innovation
tracks.description: Startup or innovation language, digital health product interest, venture/GTM keywords, building or scaling new care models. Fits MBA-HC primary, or MSHI, MHA.
